examples:
Command Example
!esm-delete-alarms alarmIds=26
Human Readable Output
Alarms has been Deleted.
18. Get details for a triggered alarm
Returns details for a triggered alarm.
Base Command
esm-get-alarm-event-details

!esm-delete-alarms alarmIds=26
Human Readable Output
Alarms has been Deleted.
18. Get details for a triggered alarm
Returns details for a triggered alarm.
Base Command
esm-get-alarm-event-details
Input
name: esm-get-alarm-event-details

outputs.description: Source IP of the event EsmAlarmEvent.DstIP Destination IP of the event
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: A list of related cases to the event EsmAlarmEvent.Cases.ID Case ID
outputs.name: EsmAlarmEvent.Cases

outputs.description: Case summary EsmAlarmEvent.DstMac Destination MAC of the event
outputs.name: EsmAlarmEvent.Cases.Summary

outputs.description: Source MAC of the event EsmAlarmEvent.DstPort Destination port of the event
outputs.name: EsmAlarmEvent.SrcMac

outputs.description: Source port of the event EsmAlarmEvent.FirstTime date
outputs.name: EsmAlarmEvent.SrcPort

outputs.description: EsmAlarmEvent.NormalizedDescription Normalized description of the event
outputs.name: The first time for the event
